summary: Comprehensive testing of PT. Anugerah Guna Perkasa website completed. Backend APIs functional with 87.5% success rate. Frontend fully functional with proper Indonesian localization, product showcase, and interactive features.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 500 server error for non-existent product IDs instead of proper error response
minor_bugs.impact: Poor error handling for invalid product requests

passed_tests: Company information API with valid Indonesian data
Products API returning all 7 products with correct categories
Individual product endpoints for existing products
Homepage loads with proper company branding
Hero section with company name and tagline in Indonesian
Navigation menu (Beranda, Tentang Kami, Produk, Lokasi)
About section with company statistics and description
Products section displaying 7 products with category filtering
Product category filters (Semua, Laundry, Household, Personal Care)
WhatsApp floating button with correct positioning
Location section with Google Maps iframe
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix server error handling in /api/products/{id} endpoint to return proper 404 or error message for non-existent products instead of 500 server error
